title: Legacy stdio transport MCP server for Mermaid diagram management
purpose: Provides a command-line interface server for Mermaid diagram management using the legacy stdio transport protocol. This server acts as a bridge between the Model Context Protocol and the Mermaid API server.
module_context: Exports a main function that sets up and runs an MCP server over stdio transport. The server requires an HTTP API server to be running first and validates connectivity before starting.

steps.content: Extract the API server port and host from environment variables with defaults.
Construct the base URL for the API server using the extracted host and port.
Send a health check request to the API server with a 2 second timeout.
IF the API server responds with an error status, log an error and exit the process.
IF the API server is unreachable or times out, log an error and exit the process.
Initialize the MCP server by calling the setup function.
Create a new stdio transport for the server.
Connect the server to the stdio transport to start listening for requests.
Log a message indicating the server is running with its version number.
